ogTitle: Sandhill Lake vs Sandhurst: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandhill Lake and Sandhurst.
heading: Sandhill Lake vs Sandhurst — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandhill Lake, Victoria and Sandhurst, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandhurst has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Sandhill Lake (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sandhill Lake or Sandhurst safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandhill Lake has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Sandhurst scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandhill Lake scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Sandhurst scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandhill Lake or Sandhurst?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandhurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
